columns.extraction_plan: Text (Abstract) on page 1: "Patients with metastatic hormone-sensitive prostate cancer were randomly assigned to darolutamide or placebo plus androgen-deprivation therapy and docetaxel." Text (Methods - Trial Design) on page 2: "Enrolled patients were randomly assigned (1:1) to oral darolutamide 600 mg twice daily or matched placebo, in combination with ADT and docetaxel." Figure 1 (CONSORT flow diagram) on page 3: Shows two distinct allocation arms: "Darolutamide + docetaxel + ADT" and "Placebo + docetaxel + ADT". Instruction: The trial included two arms. Value: 2
